title: Time Traveler Customs Form
text:
## Time Traveler Customs Form

Welcome to {place}, year {number}.

Declare all {adjective} artifacts, including {plural noun}, future {food}, and any {color} {object} capable of {verb ending in -ing}.

Traveler name: {person}

Occupation in original era: {job}

Have you recently {past-tense verb} a historical {animal}? If yes, please explain {adverb}.

Do not {verb} your own ancestor, touch the {noun}, or reveal next {day of week}'s weather.

Current emotion: {emotion}. Approved snack: {food}.
